Wazuh documentation confirms 5715 is the standard SSH authentication success rule, explicitly required by the task description and verifier.py.

Setup script injects monitoring for this file into ossec.conf and task description instructs appending SSH logs to it.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom Wazuh correlation rule (ID 100050) triggered by the standard SSH authentication success rule (5715). The custom rule parameters (level 12, timeframe 60, frequency 2) are explicitly verified in the task instructions and verifier logic. The log data is synthetically generated by the agent during the task execution and written to /var/log/auth.log, which is dynamically configured in ossec.conf by the setup script.
